products.name: Angelwax Dark Star Nebula Graphene Ceramic Coating
products.source_note: User described this as a 5-year Angelwax Nebula graphene coating. The supplied image visibly shows Angelwax Dark Star Nebula Graphene Ceramic Coating packaging but does not visibly show the duration or size.
products.notes: Premium long-term coating option. Verify final public wording with Matthias before launch.
products.website_description: Angelwax Dark Star NEBULA is a professional-grade graphene ceramic coating engineered to deliver exceptional gloss, extreme slickness, and long-term paint protection. Its graphene-enhanced formula creates a highly hydrophobic surface that helps resist water spotting, environmental contamination, and wash-induced marring while providing a deep wet-look finish.
products.image_reuse_status: User-supplied image already included. Official source page added for reference.

products.website_description: Angelwax Enigma Genesis is a premium professional ceramic coating developed for accredited installers. Featuring a single-layer application, Genesis delivers exceptional gloss, chemical resistance, swirl resistance, and outstanding hydrophobic performance while significantly simplifying vehicle maintenance.

products.website_description: Angelwax Exodus is a professional SiO₂ glass coating that bonds directly to automotive glass surfaces. It creates an ultra-smooth hydrophobic layer that improves wet-weather visibility, repels water at low speeds, and makes contaminants such as insects and road film easier to remove.
